{"status": "ok", "project_id": "01KX0865SN30AQMMSJ0FGK9KQK", "workspace_binding_id": "01KX086SN5HH5VYZMDQ6ZTDGSR", "backend_version": "source_slice_search_269d179dce40b0ac4965c1a81aa0fb9d2ba3fa96cc63ee0a7aa76b8d4c368d3e", "backend_etag": "source_slice_search_269d179dce40b0ac4965c1a81aa0fb9d2ba3fa96cc63ee0a7aa76b8d4c368d3e", "symbol": "BookingController@validateBooking", "searched_cache_only": false, "count": 1, "candidate_count": 1, "truncated": false, "server_time": "2026-07-08T07:08:33.757983Z", "items": [{"id": "01KX08SVS5BAMJ8NZC85GFBD59", "path": "app/Http/Controllers/Console/BookingController.php", "start_line": 220, "end_line": 238, "language": "php", "symbol": "BookingController@validateBooking", "head_commit": "dce3dae0b23825e857ddecc6ce001204b2d2792d", "sha256": "b48f6bb265d1d6d9e537147fd850856c3f0cbcae48b285b2d0bccee5dddc674d", "content_redacted": "220:     private function validateBooking(Request $request, string $venueId): array
221:     {
222:         $data = $request->validate([
223:             'table_id' => ['nullable', Rule::exists('tables', 'id')->where('venue_id', $venueId)],
224:             'game_id' => ['nullable', Rule::exists('games', 'id')],
225:             'user_id' => ['nullable', Rule::exists('venue_user_memberships', 'user_id')->where('venue_id', $venueId)],
226:             'ghost_alias' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
227:             'source' => ['required', Rule::in(['manager', 'user_app', 'phone'])],
228:             'status' => ['required', Rule::in(['requested', 'confirmed', 'arrived', 'completed', 'cancelled_by_user', 'cancelled_by_manager', 'no_show', 'converted_to_waitlist', 'expired'])],
229:             'starts_at' => ['required', 'date'],
230:             'ends_at' => ['nullable', 'date', 'after:starts_at'],
231:             'estimated_duration_minutes' => ['nullable', 'integer', Rule::in([30, 60, 90, 120])],
232:             'notes_public' => ['nullable', 'string'],
233:             'notes_internal' => ['nullable', 'string'],
234:         ]);
235: 
236:         abort_if(empty($data['user_id']) && empty($data['ghost_alias']), 422, 'Serve un utente registrato o un alias ghost.');
237: 
238:         return $data;", "redactions": 0, "truncated": false, "retention_class": "source_slice", "policy": "rocket_club_no_codebase_eval_bounded_lines", "updated_at": "2026-07-08T07:06:45.000000Z", "version": "source_slice_acae24337340021204486d1cf9536f5001e75b735ae3491f5ff44317fa41782c", "score": 1}], "freshness": {"status": "current", "workspace_head_commit": "dce3dae0b23825e857ddecc6ce001204b2d2792d", "artifact_head_commit": "dce3dae0b23825e857ddecc6ce001204b2d2792d", "artifact_head_source": "hades.php_graph.v1", "index_status": "live_query", "stale_reason": null, "last_artifact_at": "2026-07-08T06:59:31.000000Z", "last_evidence_at": "2026-07-08T07:06:47.000000Z"}}
